metadata.name: taxonomy_comprehensive-ver 1.5
metadata.description: Tamil Iyer meal taxonomy. v1.5: arachuvitta_sambar + pitlai merged into one sambar family (fam_004_002) with poosanikkai/katharikkai/pavarkkai vegetables; poosanikkai ingredient added; retired fam_004_003. v1.4 base otherwise unchanged.

placeholder_legend.needs_input: Seeded intentionally but incomplete; requires later naming or content decision

meal_role_legend.main_gravy: Leads the rice meal (sambar, kozhambu incl. vatha/mor)
meal_role_legend.secondary_gravy: Normally co-exists with a main gravy (rasam)
meal_role_legend.salad: Thuruval / kosumalli — ADDED beyond PK example list, confirm
meal_role_legend.standalone: Variety rice — a complete meal pattern in itself

metadata.can_lead_legend: True = may satisfy the day lead requirement alone. Class default in can_lead_default; per-item override in can_lead (meal_role_source=item_override). Admin-settable in app.

changelog.change: Merge arachuvitta+pitlai; add poosanikkai; retire fam_004_003.

items.notes: Retained per PK confirmation; sourced from Perplexity taxonomy design.
Was generic arachuvitta_sambar (no veg); given poosanikkai per PK v1.5 merge.
Merged from pitlai family per PK v1.5.
Merged from pitlai family per PK v1.5.

dish_classes.notes: Container placeholder for future lunch ideas
Crisp accompaniments; never lead a meal.

flags.onion_flag_meaning: Dish commonly contains onion or onion-led preparation
flags.garlic_flag_meaning: Dish commonly contains garlic or garlic-led preparation
flags.egg_flag_note: egg ingredient veg_054 exists; items containing it can be filtered on observance days via ingredient rules. No separate egg_flag introduced.

meal_composition.note: Exactly one lead per enforced slot. A lead is any item whose meal_role is in lead_roles, OR any item with can_lead=true. Both severities are warn per PK; admin-editable.
